title: Complex Regex Pattern Generator
scenario: Generate a regex pattern that matches any string containing at least one uppercase letter, one digit, and one special character. The pattern should also match strings that are at least 8 characters long. Assume the input string is an English word or phrase. The regex pattern should be concise and easy to read.
constraints: Must be concise and easy to read
Must match strings with at least one uppercase letter, one digit, and one special character

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the regex pattern has correct syntax and semantics.
Check if the regex pattern matches strings that meet the specified conditions.
Assess the readability and conciseness of the regex pattern.
